name: Ramon David - Ram3n_N00dlE
description:
'LETS GO GAMBILING (im gon do it responsibly though ._.) - Ramon' 
This is Ramon Ryan David Kohler. 
Ramon David Kohler was the main coder on this team, until MAX decided im not anymore, 
He knows barely any code(according to max based on how im treated now), and made Team Protostar's robot! (30503) 
He decided that it was best for him not to come afterschool for robotics anymore since he thought he was useless at that point, (gosh i hate talking about myself in the third person) 
if you really think you want be back in robotics, you can try, but i might just give up on it, 
 im not really enjoying going to robotics anymore, im probably just gonna forget about it later on and start anew. 
you can try to bring me back to wanting to come to robotics (I'll still come afterschool sometimes, but not all the time), but it might not happen.
